response.justification: The candidate is a skilled senior developer with a broad background, but he fundamentally lacks the core mandatory skills for this role. His professional C++ experience is minimal (under a year, nearly a decade ago) and not focused on Windows, falling far short of the 5-10 years required. Furthermore, he does not have the specified deep experience in capital markets/fixed income or with enterprise databases like SQL Server/Oracle. His expertise lies in web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang), making him a poor fit for this specialized C++ position.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior and staff-level software engineer.
Strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public speaking.
Proficient in modern software development practices, including CI/CD and TDD.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ experience.
No demonstrated experience in the required fixed income or capital markets domains.
No specific experience mentioned with SQL Server or Oracle as required.
